evals.prompt: Open https://example.com and take a screenshot saved to /tmp/test.png
evals.expected: Browser opens example.com, screenshot saved to file (not injected into context), /tmp/test.png exists

evals.prompt: Log into https://app.example.com with email user@test.com and password pass123, then click Submit
evals.expected: Uses snapshot -i to get @refs, fills fields by ref, re-snapshots after navigation. Never screenshots to check login state.

evals.prompt: Open site-a.com and site-b.com in two parallel sessions and screenshot each
evals.expected: Uses --session flag for both, parallel sessions maintained, screenshots saved to files

evals.prompt: Test my website on an iPhone 16 Pro simulator
evals.expected: Uses -p ios flag, lists devices first, same snapshot/interact workflow as desktop

evals.prompt: Extract all product names from https://shop.example.com/products
evals.expected: Uses snapshot -i for structure, get text for content extraction. Does NOT take screenshots to read text.
